title: Teacher misconduct panel outcome: Ms Lauren Jenkins
body: "The Secretary of State does not make these decisions themselves. They are made by a senior official on the recommendation of an independent panel.  Teacher’s name: Ms Lauren Jenkins  Teacher reference number: 0836490  Teacher’s date of birth: 20 December 1985  Location teacher worked: Keighley, West Yorkshire  Date of professional conduct panel: 29 April 2025 to 30 April 2025  Outcome type: Prohibition Order  Notice is hereby given that, in accordance with The Teachers’ Disciplinary (England) Regulations 2012, a professional conduct panel was convened to consider the case of Ms Lauren Jenkins, formerly employed in Keighley, West Yorkshire. "
